response.justification: Well over the required six years of full-stack experience with direct, recent use of the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB — plus hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work at the current role, which matches the unusual AI agent development requirement. Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, and a strong testing and TDD background round out the fit. The main gaps are no stated Nest.js, Kotlin, or Python experience, and some career depth spent in niche technologies (DLang) less relevant to this role.
strengths: Deep, recent full-stack experience in TypeScript/Node.js/React with MongoDB and AWS
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, matching a rare role requirement
Strong engineering-practice background: TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks, and teaching/mentoring
concerns: No explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Python experience listed
Significant time invested in niche DLang ecosystem rather than the role's core stack
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly named despite general testing expertise
